_doc: Structured §4.4 exemption registry. The check-dep-age.mjs script consults this file. Each exemption is bound to an exact (name, version) pair and has an expiresOn date — once the date passes, the exemption is treated as missing and the package becomes a violation again. The narrative justification lives in the documentRef markdown file.

exemptions.name: undici
exemptions.reason: §4.4 security-patch emergency: 6 HIGH CVEs (WebSocket parser crash, HTTP smuggling, memory DoS, CRLF injection); all >=90d undici versions are in the affected range
